items.title: Berkshire Hathaway Misses Projections As Abel Takes The Helm, Operating Earnings Down Nearly 25%
items.description: On Saturday, Berkshire Hathaway reported fourth-quarter and full-year 2025 results that showed net earnings attributable to shareholders slipping to $66,968 million for the year from $88,995 million in 2024.

items.title: Where is UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (UNH) Headed?
items.description: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is one of the best cheap blue chip stocks to buy according to analysts. The UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) announced on February 25 that its board of directors authorized payment of a cash dividend of $2.21 per share, to be paid on March 17, 2026, to all shareholders of record of UNH […]
